ber.gloss: to increase (intransitive); to grow (in number)

me_i.gloss: to reduce; to decrease; to lessen

ber.gloss: to decrease; to diminish (intransitive)

me.gloss: to disappear; to vanish

me_kan.gloss: to remove; to eliminate; to get rid of (something)

nya.gloss: its disappearance; the loss of it

me.gloss: to get; to obtain; to receive

me_kan.gloss: to obtain; to acquire; to get (something, with effort)

me_i.gloss: to find (someone/something in a state); to discover

di.gloss: to be obtained; to be gotten

ter.gloss: to be found; to exist; there is/are (formal)

ke_an.gloss: to be caught (doing something); found out

me_kan.gloss: to drop; to cause to fall; to topple; to overthrow

me_i.gloss: to impose/hand down (a sentence or punishment)

ber_an.gloss: to fall one after another; falling in numbers

ter.gloss: to fall (accidentally); to trip and fall

ke_an.gloss: downfall; to have something fall on oneself

nya.gloss: its fall; the falling of it; when it falls

me_kan.gloss: to arouse; to evoke; to revive; to stir up

ke_an.gloss: revival; awakening; rise (e.g. of a movement/nation)

nya.gloss: its rise; the rising/revival of it

me_kan.gloss: to finish; to complete; to resolve

nya.gloss: its completion; when it's finished; upon completion

me.gloss: to try; to attempt

me_i.gloss: to test; to tempt (someone) (literary/religious register)

di.gloss: to be tried; to be tested

an.gloss: trial; test; tribulation (especially of life or faith)

me_kan.gloss: to prepare; to get (something) ready

ber.gloss: to get ready; to prepare oneself

me.gloss: to register; to enroll; to sign up

me_kan.gloss: to register/enroll (someone, on someone's behalf)

di.gloss: to be registered; to be listed

ber.gloss: registered; on the list/roll

me.gloss: to borrow

me_kan.gloss: to lend (something to someone)

me_i.gloss: to lend to (someone, repeatedly/habitually)

di.gloss: to be borrowed

me.gloss: to rent (from someone); to hire

me_kan.gloss: to rent out; to lease (to someone)

di.gloss: to be rented

me.gloss: to call (someone); to summon

me_kan.gloss: to call (someone/something) for someone else

di.gloss: to be called

ter.gloss: called (to do something); compelled (by a sense of duty)

pe_an.gloss: calling; summons (process, e.g. of a witness)

me_kan.gloss: to shout (something); to yell out; to cry out

me_i.gloss: to shout at (someone)

ber.gloss: to shout; to yell (intransitive)

me.gloss: to sing

me_kan.gloss: to sing (a specific song); to perform (a song)

ber.gloss: to sing (intransitive, common in everyday speech)

me.gloss: to dance

me_kan.gloss: to dance/perform (a specific dance)

an.gloss: dance (as a noun); a dance routine

me.gloss: to measure

di.gloss: to be measured

ber_an.gloss: to be sized; measuring (a certain size)

se.gloss: the same size as; as big/measured as

me.gloss: to weigh (something); to consider; to deliberate

di.gloss: to be weighed

me_kan.gloss: to compare

ber.gloss: to be in proportion to; in ratio to (berbanding lurus/terbalik)

nya.gloss: its match/equal (often in negation: tiada bandingnya)

me_kan.gloss: to disparage; to badmouth; to make (something) look bad

me.gloss: to become fat; to gain weight (intransitive)

me_kan.gloss: to fatten (up); to make (someone/something) fat
to make (someone/something) thin; to slim down

me_i.gloss: to fool; to deceive; to make a fool of (someone)

pe_an.gloss: dumbing down; act of fooling/deceiving the masses

me.gloss: to expand; to spread; to widen (intransitive)

me_kan.gloss: to widen; to expand (something); to broaden

se.gloss: as wide as; the extent of (seluas-luasnya = as widely as possible)

nya.gloss: its size/extent; how wide it is

per_an.gloss: expansion; widening (e.g. perluasan wilayah = territorial expansion)

me.gloss: to go deep; deep; in-depth (often used adjectivally)

me_i.gloss: to study (something) in depth; to deepen one's understanding

se.gloss: as deep as (sedalam-dalamnya = as deeply as possible)

nya.gloss: its depth; how deep it is

me.gloss: to become shallow (e.g. a river silting up)

me_kan.gloss: to make shallow; to cause to silt up

ke_an.gloss: shallowness (literal or figurative, e.g. shallow thinking)

me.gloss: to thicken; to become thick (intransitive)

me_kan.gloss: to thicken (something); to bold/embolden text

nya.gloss: its thickness; how thick it is

me.gloss: to thin out; to become thin; to dwindle (also figuratively)

me_kan.gloss: to thin (something) out; to make thin

me.gloss: to become heavy; to get heavier

me_kan.gloss: to burden; to incriminate; to weigh down; to make heavier

nya.gloss: its weight; how heavy it is

me.gloss: to soften; to become soft/gentle (intransitive)

me_kan.gloss: to soften (something)
to smooth (something); to lubricate; to grease the wheels (figurative)

me_i.gloss: to wet; to moisten (something)

me_kan.gloss: to refresh; to freshen up; refreshing

me.gloss: to rot; to decay; to decompose

me_kan.gloss: to cause to rot; to spoil (something); to tarnish (a reputation)
to ripen (something); to mature/finalize (a plan)
to nullify; to refute; to render void (an argument or agreement)

nya.gloss: how raw/unprocessed it is (e.g. data mentah = raw data)

me_kan.gloss: to salt (something); to cure with salt
to sweeten (something)

nya.gloss: how bitter it is (also figurative: pahitnya kenyataan)

me.gloss: to turn sour (intransitive)

me_kan.gloss: to acidify; to make sour

ke_an.gloss: to feel the burn (from spicy food); excessive spiciness

me.gloss: to bargain; to haggle; to make an offer/bid

me_kan.gloss: to offer (something)

me_i.gloss: to offer (someone) something

di.gloss: to be bargained over; to receive an offer/bid

pe_an.gloss: offer; bid; supply (as in supply and demand)

an.gloss: offer (noun, e.g. tawaran pekerjaan = job offer)

me.gloss: to smell fragrant; to be fragrant (intransitive)

me_kan.gloss: to make fragrant; to perfume (something)

me.gloss: to smell (something); to sniff; to stink/smell (bad)

me_i.gloss: to smell/sniff (something, more deliberately)

pe.gloss: sense of smell (organ, e.g. indera pembau)

me.gloss: to move away; to distance oneself (intransitive)

me_kan.gloss: to keep (something/someone) away; to distance/separate

me_i.gloss: to avoid; to stay away from (someone/something)

ke_an.gloss: too far; distance; from a distance (dari kejauhan)

se.gloss: as far as (sejauh ini = so far/thus far)

nya.gloss: its distance; how far it is

me.gloss: to approach; to come closer (intransitive)

me_kan.gloss: to bring (something/someone) closer

me_i.gloss: to approach (someone/something); nearly (approximate)

nya.gloss: its closeness; how close it is

me_kan.gloss: to make proud; to be a source of pride; pride-worthy

me.gloss: to long for; to yearn (intransitive, literary)

me_kan.gloss: to miss (someone/something); to long for

me.gloss: to hate

nya.gloss: how much (someone) hates (something), e.g. Bencinya aku!

me_kan.gloss: annoying; irritating
boring
to worry (someone); to be worrying, alarming

me_i.gloss: to admire

me_kan.gloss: amazing; admirable; astonishing
surprising; astonishing

nya.gloss: surprisingly; oddly enough (discourse marker, e.g. Herannya, dia tidak marah)

me_i.gloss: to suspect (someone)

me_kan.gloss: suspicious (causing suspicion)
disappointing
to gladden; heartening/pleasing (news)
to care about; to pay attention to; to heed

me_i.gloss: to love; to cherish (someone)

me_kan.gloss: to regret; to lament (a situation)

nya.gloss: unfortunately; what a pity; sadly (very common discourse marker)

me_kan.gloss: satisfying
convincing; to convince (someone)

me_i.gloss: to believe in; to be convinced of (something)

me_kan.gloss: doubtful; questionable; to doubt/cast doubt on (something)
surprising; shocking; startling

an.gloss: surprise (noun), e.g. kejutan = surprise/pesta kejutan = surprise party

me_i.gloss: to shower (someone) with (something), figurative (menghujani pertanyaan = to bombard with questions)

ke_an.gloss: to get caught in the rain; rained on

nya.gloss: the rain; how much it's raining

me_kan.gloss: to air out (something); to let air through; to ventilate

ber.gloss: windy

me.gloss: to rise into the sky/clouds; to soar (literary)

ber.gloss: cloudy

me.gloss: to pile up (like a mountain); to accumulate greatly (figurative, e.g. utang menggunung = debt piled up)

se.gloss: as big as a mountain (figurative, e.g. masalahnya segunung)

me.gloss: to go out to sea (especially to fish)

an.gloss: ocean; vast sea (emphatic/larger form, e.g. lautan manusia = a sea of people)

me_kan.gloss: to reforest; to turn (land) into forest
to ostracize; to boycott; to shun (someone) -- figurative, like isolating someone on an island

per_an.gloss: rural areas (formal/administrative register; "pedesaan" without the r is more common colloquially)

me.gloss: to skyrocket; to soar (prices, fame, etc., figurative)

se.gloss: sky-high (e.g. harganya selangit = the price is sky-high)

me.gloss: to become grounded/down-to-earth; to take root (figurative, of an idea spreading)

me_kan.gloss: to ground (something); to make (an idea) accessible/relatable

me.gloss: to flood; to pour in (literally or figuratively)

me_i.gloss: to flood/inundate (something) with, often figurative (barang impor membanjiri pasar)

ke_an.gloss: to be flooded; flooded with, also figurative (kebanjiran tugas = flooded with assignments)

ber.gloss: foggy; covered in fog

me.gloss: to smooth a surface by rubbing (cloth, wood); to remove wrinkles or roughen
to rinse (something)

di.gloss: to be rinsed

pe.gloss: rinsing agent; something that rinses (e.g. air pembilas, rinse aid)

pe_an.gloss: the act or process of rinsing

ber.gloss: to rinse off with clean water after bathing/swimming (e.g. in the sea or a pool), as a second wash
